title: Chainsaw Man - Fabric
description: I tried to represent and animate elements from the anime "chainsaw man", aiming to capture its essence in the hotbar.
body:
Today, I'm excited to present a new custom hotbar inspired by the intense world of Chainsaw Man!
@znygames
### рЯОЮ| TRAILER ### рЯЦЉ| EXAMPLE HOTBAR ![hotbar animated](https://i.imgur.com/fsgIcZL.gif) ![hotbar_01](https://i.imgur.com/OK6kj3F.png) ![hotbar_02](https://i.imgur.com/74eJ66L.png) ### рЯЧТ| DESCRIPTION This time, the theme is "Chainsaw Man." I hope you like it! I tried to represent and animate elements from the anime, aiming to capture its essence in the hotbar. The texture pack includes a new hotbar and new icons, such as the hunger bar and more, all designed to reflect the Chainsaw Man theme. You can use this pack in the standard Vanilla version and with Fabric. Dive into your Minecraft world with this dynamic and exciting look! New! with this pack: - This Java Minecraft texture pack is now also available for Fabric. - The pack is playable with Fabric Loader versions 0.15.11 - 1.21. - animated hotbarвАГ ### рЯЫИ |INSTALL Note: If you encounter any issues, make sure that the texture pack is compatible with your version of Minecraft, and that you have followed all of the steps correctly.
Install FABRIC - The latest Fabric Launcher is required for the Minecraft Fabric mod. Fabric Loader 0.15.11-1.21 - Update your Java. At least java 21 Java Oracle
### рЯТђ| COMMUNITY (гБ£пЉЊвЦњпЉЊ)џґрЯНЄрЯМЯрЯНЇў©(ЋШвЧ°ЋШ ) Hey, We invite you to join our Discord community where you can connect with fellow players, share your ideas, and report any bugs you encounter. Whether you have suggestions for improving the hotbar or need support with any issues, our community is here to help. LetвАЩs build, explore, and create together! ### рЯФЧ|BEDROCK VERSION ### рЯТЦ| THX! See you in the next pack!
